overview: Narasaraopeta Engineering College (NEC), located on Kotappakonda Road in Narasaraopet, Palnadu District, Andhra Pradesh, is a prominent autonomous engineering institution established in 1998. Sponsored by the Gayatri Educational Development Society, the college spans a 40-acre campus and has evolved into a premier regional destination for technical education. It is recognized for its comprehensive curricula across computing, traditional engineering disciplines, and postgraduate management studies.
accreditation: NAAC Grade 'A+'; Approved by AICTE; Permanently affiliated to JNTUK, Kakinada. Key undergraduate B.Tech engineering branches are accredited by the NBA.

placements.placementRate: Eligible Students: 100% placement track rate recorded
placements.totalOffers: 1,297+ job selections during the recent consolidated recruitment cycle
placements.companiesVisited: 87 corporate companies participated in recruitment operations
placements.internshipHighlights: Maintains industry linkage collaborations with Microsoft and Salesforce for practical exposure and project training.

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A (Convenor Quota) allocations are handled through corporate state-level entrance exam counselling. Category B (Management/Spot Admissions) can be applied for via the institutional admissions team.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions systematically align with APSCHE academic counseling calendars for AP EAPCET, AP ICET, and AP PGECET.

campus.specialNote: Separate secure residential compounds are maintained for boys and girls with multi-cuisine dining options provided.

contact.address: Narasaraopeta Engineering College, Kotappakonda Road, Narasaraopet, Palnadu District, Andhra Pradesh - 522601, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: State-sponsored tuition incentives and academic fee concessions given based on competitive entry rankings.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Eligible candidates receive explicit institutional fee support or corporate concessions based on top merit performance.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Eligible state-allocated students receive distinct partial academic or structural allowances.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full tuition fee reimbursement benefits provided through state initiatives like the Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) scheme for qualifying social brackets.
